calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Petitioner. Phillip Campbell for Ramon Aenlle.

The Court approved the First and Final Account (subject to receipt and review of the order) with the following adjustments: 1) The reserve account will be reduced to $2,000.00. 2) The reimbursement payment will be in the amount of $2,291.08 plus the expenses of last illness in the amounts of $7,881.26 to the hospital and $365.20 to the Doctor. 3) The Request for sanctions is denied. Mr. Weinkauf is to prepare the order.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration And Any Remaining Issues From The March 16, 2011 Petition
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Text Ruling

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Continued To Jun-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Teresa Green for Ramon Castillo Aenlle (Objector). Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Guardian.

The accounting petition and the remaining issues from the March 26, 2011 petition that are not moot were continued to June 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Weinkauf to respond to the declartation filed by the Objector. Ms. Green is to file any additional pleadings by May 18, 2012. Mr. Weinkauf is to file his reply to all papers filed by the Objector by May 29, 2012.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Rosada.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration And Any Remaining Issues From The March 16, 2011 Petition
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Continued To Jun-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration And Any Remaining Issues From The March 16, 2011 Petition
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Continued To Apr-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phillip Campbell for Ramon Aenlle.

The Court noted that the First and Final Account was filed with a hearing date of April 25, 2012. The remaining issues from the March 16, 2011 petition was also continued to April 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Andrade.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration And Any Remaining Issues From The March 16, 2011 Petition

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Probate
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Public Administrator. Phillip Campbell for Ramon Castillo.

Discussions/argument on how to proceed with distribution were held/presented. The Court addmitted the will and codicil, appointed the Public Administrator with will annexed, and stated that the final account and report for final distribution will be consistant with the Guam's order for final distribution. Status of administration and any remaining issues from the March 16, 2011 petition was set for January 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
